top25.title: SurroSister Secrets.. Part 7!
top25.description: Yay!! Another Entry from SecretSurro to start the weekend!! Tonight is about pie. And personal questions. My intended dad and I share a sweet tooth, and so weвҖҷve determined that IвҖҷll make a pie for dessert for dinner at
top25.author: Canadian Surrogacy Options
top25.content:
Yay!! Another Entry from SecretSurro to start the weekend!!

Tonight is about pie. And personal questions.

My intended dad and I share a sweet tooth, and so weвҖҷve determined that IвҖҷll make a pie for dessert for dinner at their house. I love cooking, but this is the first time IвҖҷve actually made a pie вҖ“ desserts arenвҖҷt my strong suit. But I couldnвҖҷt resist the alliteration when I asked my Intended Mom if we could do a вҖңPie and Personal QuestionsвҖқ night, dubbed вҖңP&P.вҖқ

We show up with pie attempt #2. Number one was inedible due to unbearable sweetness, and I heave a big sigh of relief that I had a backup in the pipes. They made chicken parmesan, a fave of ours and fall comfortably into generally chatting. As much as weвҖҷve chatted quite a bit, and weвҖҷre excited about moving forward, I know before we can move to testing we need to get out some nitty gritty. TheyвҖҷll want to know why AM I becoming a surrogate? (I have a fairly considered answer to that, but it still feels like a lot to explain to someone else). My hubby and I wonder how the challenges in their journey have moved them to this point? I still have so much to learn, but I want to know about the technical parts of their (our?) position too. Do they have embryos? How long would we be waiting if they donвҖҷt? And if a transfer fails, do we all want to try again?

Hard questions are hard. Maybe theyвҖҷll be easier with pie.

We finish dinner without having broached any of the necessary personal questions yet. IвҖҷm gearing up to open my mouth when Dad asks, вҖңSo, how did you hear about CSO?вҖқ I let out a nervous laugh, but feel inexplicably jittery getting to the details. I feel emotional recounting all of my whys, and IвҖҷm actually a little shaky in the voice. I didnвҖҷt expect this. There are many moments that I expected big feelings. There are those typical landmark moments that warrant emotions to bubble up. First heartbeat, first positive blood work, gender reveals and announcements. Those moments are when I expected the emotion. But talking about my why, and them talking about how much theyвҖҷve experienced in their journey, and IвҖҷm left shaken.

With every answer, I feel reassurance, and the more openly we talk the more comfortable I feel. These are my people, these are my intended parents, and I canвҖҷt wait to get started with them.

After this slice of pie.

Signed,

SecretSurroвҖҰ

top25.description: If youвҖҷre reading this post, you are probably considering becoming a surrogate mother, and thatвҖҷs so wonderful. But you likely have many questions as many women do when they start thinking about how to become a surrogate
top25.author: Canadian Surrogacy Options
tags: How To Become A Surrogate Mother - Canada How To Become A Surrogate Mother - Canada How To Become a Surrogate Mother
keywords: How To Become A Surrogate Mother - Canada How To Become A Surrogate Mother - Canada How To Become a Surrogate Mother
top25.content:
If youвҖҷre reading this post, you are probably considering becoming a surrogate mother, and thatвҖҷs so wonderful. But you likely have many questions as many women do when they start thinking about

how to become a surrogate mother

We wanted to remind you of a few things to think about as you make your decision to become a surrogate. We hope you find this helpful as you start your surrogacy journey, and if there is anything you would like to add about your own decision of becoming a surrogate, please leave us a comment!

First things first вҖ“ always discuss your decision with your

family members and loved ones

. They are the ones who will support you through your journey.

Think about all the wonderful things associated with being a surrogate, and how you are helping another family in need. Our last

blog post

outlined some of these.

If you love being pregnant, then surrogacy is right for you! This one of the biggest factors of becoming a surrogate.

You really must love being pregnant

. Most surrogates are women who are finished growing their families but love being pregnant. ItвҖҷs an amazing thing to do for couple who want a child more than anything, but just cannot grow a family on their own.

Weigh out the options involved. Did you know there are different

types of surrogacy

? ItвҖҷs important to do as much research as possible on surrogacy so you are prepared when you meet with your agency. There are some things you will want to consider, such as who you are comfortable being a surrogate for, and which

type of surrogacy

you feel comfortable with as well.

Consult with a

surrogacy agency

like

Canadian Surrogacy Options

. We will meet with you to discuss everything about surrogacy and present you with thoughts about surrogacy you may not have thought about during your own decision process. We even offer counselling and support groups to ensure that your surrogacy journey is comfortable and you feel supported.

We know that becoming a surrogate is a big decision, even when the idea of it feels natural. But as a

surrogacy agency in Canada

, Canadian Surrogacy Options is committed to the success of your journey and your well-being. We will support you all the way! If you have any questions regarding Canadian surrogacy, please contact us!

## Media Links

https://canadiansurrogacyoptions.com/wp-content/uploads/2015/01/becoming-a-surro.2.jpg
